name: ASUS ProArt Z890-CREATOR WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851 - Supports DDR5-8600+(OC) - 2x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x16 - 5x M.2 Slots - 2x Thunderbolt 5 Type-C - DisplayPort - HDMI 2.1 - Marvell AQtion 10G LAN - Intel 2.5Gb LAN - Wi-Fi 7 802.11be
shortName: ASUS ProArt Z890-CREATOR WIFI ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1851
description: Professional ASUS ProArt ATX motherboard for LGA 1851 socket with dual PCIe 5.0, Thunderbolt 5, and 10G LAN.
